metadata.title: Blue Suede Shoes
metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.04] Well, it's one for the money, two for the show
[00:02.98] Three to get ready, now go, Cat, go
[00:05.32] But don't you step on my blue suede shoes
[00:10.35] Well, you can do anything, but stay off of my blue suede shoes
[00:15.36] Well, you can knock me down, step in my face
[00:18.21] Slander my name all over the place
[00:20.85] Well, do anything that you wanna do
[00:24.45] But uh-uh honey, lay off of them shoes
[00:25.83] And don't you step on my blue suede shoes
[00:30.78] Well, you can do anything, but stay off of my blue suede shoes
[00:34.44] Let's go, Cats
[00:37.34] 
[00:40.49] Oh, walk the dog
[00:50.82] Well, you can burn my house, steal my car
[00:54.94] Drink my liquor from an old fruit jar
[00:56.48] Well, do anything that you wanna do
[01:00.05] But uh-uh, honey, lay off of my shoes
[01:02.53] And don't you step on my blue suede shoes
[01:07.34] Well, you can do anything, but lay off of my blue suede shoes
[01:10.08] Rock it
[01:12.53] 
[01:16.95] Yeah!
[01:26.05] Well, it's one for the money, two for the show
[01:28.97] Three to get ready, now go, go, go
[01:32.62] But don't you step on my blue suede shoes
[01:37.51] Well, you can do anything, but lay off of my blue suede shoes
[01:42.31] Well, it's blue, blue, blue suede shoes
[01:45.44] Blue, blue, blue suede shoes, yeah
[01:48.26] Blue, blue, blue suede shoes, baby
[01:50.72] Blue, blue, blue suede shoes
[01:52.52] Well, you can do anything, but lay off of my blue suede shoes
[01:59.37]
